ddls:
CREATE TABLE "system_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system record */,
  "record_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "created_on_behalf_by" INTEGER /* ID of the delegate user who created the record on behalf of another user */,
  "created_by_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user who created the record */,
  "import_sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the import that created this record */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who modified the record */,
  "modified_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last modified */,
  "modified_by_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user who modified the record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_records_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_records_created_on_behalf_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_on_behalf_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_records_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system record being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  "audit_data" TEXT /* Additional audit data */,
  "audit_category" TEXT /* Audit category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_audit_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES system_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_audit_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom attribute */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system record the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the custom attribute */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the custom attribute */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Whether the custom attribute is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_attributes_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES system_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "import_logs" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import log entry */,
  "import_sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the import */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the import occurred */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the import */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the import */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message for failed imports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_import_logs_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_import_logs_import_sequence_number FOREIGN KEY ("import_sequence_number") REFERENCES system_records ("import_sequence_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the record type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the record type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the record type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the security role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_access_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES system_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_record_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_config" (
  "config_key" TEXT /* Configuration key */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Configuration value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_relationships" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system record */,
  "related_record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related system record */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id", "related_record_id")
)
